## ESTRUTURA

### 01-Lessons (14 Lições)

| # | Título | Arquivos | Bytes | Temas Principais |
|---|--------|----------|-------|-----------------|
| 01 | Introduction & Structure of Copy | mp4 + pdf | 15,434 | AIDA, SSS, PAS, Objection-based |
| 02 | What Makes Great Copy | mp4 + pdf | 14,298 | 4 C's, 2 H's, Mom Test, brainstorming |
| 03 | Secrets of Copy Strategy | mp4 + pdf | 4,602 | Simple Math, Opposite technique, 100 headlines |
| 04 | Journey to Provoking Action | mp4 | 9,792 | Dual Journey, 5 Stages Sophistication, Resistance |
| 05 | Discover What Makes Your Prospect Tick | mp4 | 9,617 | 6W framework, Amazon research, enemy identification |
| 06 | Understanding Buying Psychology | mp4 | 9,591 | 10 Buying Motivators, Touch of Larceny |
| 07 | How to Write Compelling Stories | mp4 | 12,876 | Hero's Journey, Story Arc, 3 Story Types, story collection |
| 08 | Headlines and Bullets Secrets Pt1 | mp4 | 17,461 | BULLETS framework, Hook concept, One-legged golfer |
| 09 | Headlines and Bullets Secrets Pt2 | mp4 | 9,489 | Headline formulas, Fantasy method, short vs long |
| 10 | The Close - Getting the Sale | mp4 | 15,780 | Close Architecture, Guarantee, Scarcity, Crossroads |
| 11 | The Body - Keeping Readers Reading | mp4 | 16,724 | Leads, Weaving, Indirect vs Direct, Exclusion |
| 12 | The Power of the Creative Brief | mp4 | 9,514 | Creative Brief framework, Resources, Gene Schwartz story |
| 13 | How to Make Good Copy Better | mp4 | 10,134 | Editing process, Read aloud, Simplicity, 80/20 |
| 14 | Questions and Answers | mp4 | 18,010 | Headline techniques, testing, Q&A compilation |

---

## NOTAS

- **PDFs de Lessons 1-3:** Contêm slides com bullet summaries + exercícios. Não repetem conteúdo dos vídeos.
- **PDFs de Bonuses B2:** Contêm o copy real das promoções (magalogs) que DD analisa nos vídeos. Material primário valioso.
- **2 arquivos stub:** <200 bytes (PDF covers sem conteúdo) — ignorados na extração.
- **Lori Haller:** Contribuiu conteúdo de design (B1). Não incluído no DNA de DD, exceto HEUR-DD-014 (stock photo page 500).
- **Breakdowns:** Promoções reais escritas por DD para Boardroom — evidência direta dos frameworks na prática.
